creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
I take that back.  In the specific case of deskutils/pueue, the port has been failing on armv7 since at least the beginning of September.  And the most recent build used Rust-1.81.0.  I would expect the build to succeed with Rust 1.82.0.

https://portsfallout.com/port/33530/
